The '''YT-1150 cargo transport''' was a [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Characteristics==
It resembled an oval split lengthwise into three sections, the middle being the longest. Its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was held on a nacelle.

==History==
[[Charza Kwinn]], a [[Priapulin]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who worked for the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], had a YT-1150 named ''[[Star Sea Flower]]'', which transported [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].

{{Ship-stub}}
